_note: Best-effort calibration for the extra clips (entry 1/2, billing_area, zone). 960x1080, different angle/day than the main store. No POS for this store, so conversion comes from queue_completed (served) only.

cameras.description: Glass storefront, camera inside looking out. The mall corridor is at the TOP (people pass by behind the glass) and the store's wooden floor is BELOW the door threshold. Counting line sits ON the door threshold (where the glass meets the wooden floor, y=0.60, calibrated from frames) so a visitor is counted only once their feet step onto the store floor (fully entered), not when they walk past in the corridor. Inbound = moving DOWN into the store.

Second glass-door view of the same storefront. Counting line on the door threshold (y=0.62, calibrated) so visitors are counted only when fully onto the store's wooden floor, not while passing in the mall corridor above. Inbound = moving DOWN.
Billing counter; customers queue in front (centre).
Product shelf aisle; customers browse the central aisle.
